overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage following a character on rollerblades through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The camera smoothly tracks the character through intersections, covered walkways with dynamic colored lighting, and under elevated highways in a rain-slicked urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban intersection with wet streets and neon signage

events.description: camera begins moving forward from street corner into the intersection
futuristic blue car passes by on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: navigating the cyberpunk city streets on foot, approaching the crosswalk

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisements with cyberpunk branding on building facades
rain-slicked reflective road surface with neon light reflections
massive concrete highway overpass with yellow accent lighting
bold yellow zebra stripes painted on the road surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked cyberpunk intersection at night, surrounded by towering buildings covered in neon billboards. The camera moves forward through the wide urban space, passing a blue futuristic vehicle and approaching a yellow crosswalk under an elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered intersection entrance with City Center signage

events.description: character on rollerblades enters frame and begins crossing the street
black truck waits at the intersection as the character crosses

agents.ego_description: following the rollerblading character closely as they navigate the crosswalk under the City Center overpass

notable_agents.action: character with blue hair and rollerblades skating across the intersection ahead of the camera

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading 'CITY CENTER' mounted on the overpass structure
massive concrete columns supporting the elevated highway above

segments.scene_description: The camera catches up to a rollerblading character with blue hair crossing the intersection. They pass under the City Center overpass, moving from the open street into a semi-covered area with support pillars. A black truck waits at the crossing as the character skates past.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide pedestrian crosswalk transitioning to covered walkway

events.description: entering the covered pedestrian walkway with illuminated wall panels

agents.ego_description: following the rollerblading character along the wide yellow-striped crosswalk toward the colorful corridor

entered.detail: building facade with large rectangular panels that shift between pink, purple, and blue colors
overhead structure providing partial cover over the pedestrian path

segments.scene_description: The character skates along the wide yellow crosswalk away from the intersection, entering a covered pedestrian zone. The left wall features large illuminated panels that glow with shifting neon colors, transitioning from the open street to a more enclosed urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with dynamic colored lighting and digital advertisements

events.description: wall panels shift from pink/purple to blue and green lighting
lighting transitions to yellow and red tones along the corridor wall

agents.ego_description: following the character through the covered walkway as they skate past illuminated storefronts

entered.detail: large screens displaying advertisements with human figures in futuristic fashion
illuminated storefront signage for various tech and retail shops

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the character through a covered pedestrian corridor lined with dynamic colored light panels that shift through pink, blue, green, and red hues. Digital billboards and neon shop signs line the left wall while the right side opens to the street, creating an immersive cyberpunk arcade atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under elevated highway with traffic barriers

events.description: exiting the covered corridor back to open street level under the elevated highway
blue and white van passes by on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the rollerblading character along the sidewalk under the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: blue and white van driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: yellow and concrete barriers separating the sidewalk from the road
curved on-ramp structure for the overhead highway system

segments.scene_description: The character exits the colorful corridor back to street level, skating along a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway. Yellow traffic barriers line the left side separating the path from the road where vehicles pass by. The environment shifts from the enclosed neon arcade to an open but covered urban thoroughfare with distant city lights ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rain-slicked urban intersection into a vibrant neon corridor before returning to an open city thoroughfare. It begins by gliding through a towering district of neon billboards and futuristic vehicles, moving toward a yellow crosswalk beneath a massive elevated highway. As the camera catches up to a blue-haired character on rollerblades, the scene shifts from the open street into a semi-covered area with heavy support pillars and waiting traffic. The movement then flows into an enclosed pedestrian zone where the environment transforms into a cyberpunk arcade, characterized by walls of dynamic light panels shifting through pink, blue, green, and red hues. Finally, the character exits this colorful corridor back to street level, skating along a sidewalk lined with yellow traffic barriers beneath the highway as the view opens toward distant city lights.
